task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Chemical Storage' repository in the SciNote Inventory module.

Screenshots show 'Acetonitrile' being selected for archiving, an archive confirmation dialog including it, or it is successfully removed from the active items list.
Screenshots show 'Methanol' being selected for archiving, an archive confirmation dialog including it, or it is successfully removed from the active items list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target repository: 'Chemical Storage'. Items to archive (expired before Jan 1, 2025): 'Acetonitrile', 'Methanol', 'Chloroform'. Items to keep (expire on or after Jan 1, 2025): 'Ethanol 96%', 'Isopropanol'.
